premium.title: PALIMPS Premium
premium.subtitle: Unlock the full power of your reading memory
premium.noCreditSystem: No credit system – all features unlimited
premium.alreadyPremium: You are already a Premium member
premium.noPackages: No packages available. Please try again later.
premium.terms: Subscription can be cancelled anytime from App Store settings. Auto-renews; if not cancelled 24 hours before renewal, it renews at the same price.
premium.activated: Your Premium membership is now active.
premium.purchaseError: An error occurred, please try again.
premium.restoredMessage: Your Premium membership has been restored.
premium.aiNotesDesc: Automatically generate smart notes from your reading moments
premium.aiSummaryDesc: Generate comprehensive summaries of your books with AI
premium.aiThematicDesc: Group your reading moments thematically and discover connections
premium.advancedSearchDesc: Search across all your books and notes with powerful filters
premium.readingStatsDesc: Track your reading progress with detailed graphs and analytics
premium.exportOptionsDesc: Export your notes as PDF, Markdown, or plain text
premium.multiLangDesc: Use in Turkish, English, German, and Spanish
premium.unlimitedStorageDesc: Store all your reading moments and photos without limits
